title: Kagi Translate now supports LinkedIn Speak as an output language
author: smitec
aiHeadline: Kagi Translate now offers a 'LinkedIn Speak' mode, because who doesn't want to sound like a corporate robot while pretending to be 'authentic'?

title: Reddit User Uncovers Who Is Behind Meta's $2B Lobbying for Age Verification Tech
author: doener
aiHeadline: Reddit hero uncovers Meta's $2B lobbying for age verification tech, proving that even Big Tech can't resist the urge to be intrusive.

title: Kagi Small Web
author: trueduke
aiHeadline: Kagi Small Web: Because the internet is just too big and overwhelming, right? Let's make it smaller and more manageable—because that's the only way to survive it.

title: Microsoft's 'unhackable' Xbox One has been hacked by 'Bliss'
author: crtasm
aiHeadline: Microsoft's 'unhackable' Xbox One finally gets hacked, proving once again that 'unhackable' is just a marketing term that means 'we'll get around to fixing it eventually.'

title: Every layer of review makes you 10x slower
author: greyface-
aiHeadline: Every layer of review makes you 10x slower, because nothing says 'efficiency' like a never-ending cycle of approvals and red tape.
